ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Closing Estate
Off Calendar Dec-10-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Closing Estate
Off Calendar Nov-12-2019 Continued To Dec-10-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joyce Gandelman appeared by telephone for Petitioner.

Ms. Gandelman stated that the inventory and appraisal was prepared in March, that they inadvertently thought it had gone out and that it went out in the mail on Friday. Ms. Gandelman also stated that the petition for final distribution is being prepared, that it will be filed in the next week or two, and that the estate is ready to close. Status on close of estate is continued to December 10, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The inventory and the petition are to be filed well in advance of the hearing.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
